title: OatSteam Bliss
description: A fresh and light Egyptian brunch dish featuring gluten-free oatmeal steamed in a flavorful broth for a delightful start to the day.
instructions: Rinse the oatmeal well and place it in a medium saucepan.
Add water, sugar or honey, cardamom pods, cinnamon sticks, and vanilla bean. Stir until sugar is dissolved.
Bring to a boil over high heat, then reduce to a simmer and let cook for 20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Gently add chopped ginger root and almonds (if using). Continue cooking for an additional 5-10 minutes or until desired consistency is reached.
Taste the oatmeal for sweetness; adjust with more sugar if needed. Stir in fresh mint leaves to infuse the dish with its refreshing flavor.
Remove from heat and serve hot.
